name: Tsurumi Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
summary: Tsurumi Manufacturing Co., Ltd. produces, purchases, imports, and exports pumps and peripheral equipment worldwide. The company's products are used in construction and mining, industry and energy, agriculture and irrigation, river and flood control, waterworks, and wastewater environmental protection fields. Tsurumi Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
